name: Category 27: Paid Advertising
description: Paid advertising automation and optimization workflows

automations.name: Budget Pacing Monitor
automations.description: Monitors daily/monthly budget spend and adjusts pacing

automations.name: Ad A/B Test Manager
automations.description: Automates A/B test setup and determines winners

automations.name: Negative Keyword Harvester
automations.description: Identifies and adds negative keywords automatically

automations.name: Retargeting Audience Builder
automations.description: Creates and updates retargeting audiences automatically

automations.name: ROAS Calculator and Alerter
automations.description: Calculates ROAS and triggers alerts on low performance

automations.name: Campaign Pause/Resume Automation
automations.description: Auto-pauses/resumes campaigns based on performance triggers

automations.name: Landing Page Performance Tracker
automations.description: Tracks landing page conversion and engagement metrics
